events.title: Speak with Authority Networking that Clicks
events.description: Networking does not have to feel awkward, forced, or transactional. Yet, many business professionals struggle because their introductions feel unclear or they overthink conversations instead of building real connections. If you’ve ever found yourself relying on a your job title or a using industry buzz words that leave your listener confused this workshop is for you.
